notes:
v1.3.3 Update
⚡ Now supports Foundry VTT V13 and V14. Previous versions are no longer supported.
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Tile highlight and click detection now use correct coordinates on V14.
• Tile HUD buttons now render consistently with core Foundry HUD style.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.3.3
announcement.content:
v1.3.3 — V14 Migration

  • ⚡ V14 Support: Now supports Foundry VTT V13 and V14.
  • 🐛 Tile Coordinates: Highlight and click detection fixed for V14.
  • 🐛 HUD Buttons: Consistent rendering with core Foundry style.
